raw_output:
PR #7 security review (Claude, Fable 5, fresh-context).

Findings: S1 (info) residual rounding window at precision 2 — empirically pinned: 98.995 passes, 98.994 fails (coverage 7.15.2); 100x tightening, not elimination; suggested ADR note. S2 (info) the strengthened check's semantics live inside the unpinned coverage transitive (pytest-cov pinned, coverage floats) — a future or compromised coverage release could alter a required check's behavior with no diff in this repo; pre-existing floating-transitives residual, increased reliance noted.

Verification: strict monotone tightening proven (precision-2 pass set is a strict subset of precision-0's; no total passes at 2 that failed at 0); config placement correct; no ConfigError path (integer fail_under); side effects limited to display + comparison; gate script unaffected (stdlib, never reads pyproject); docs-describe-what-is checks pass — the wave plan's escalation claim is a voluntary tightening beyond review-gate.md's letter (obligation overstatement, not enforcement overstatement; not a finding); nothing consumer-executable in the diff. No blocking findings.

--- Post-review delta note (orchestrator, attested at final head 57bb1f2) ---
Single-round battery on 1c-file diff converged with zero blocking findings.
Post-review commit 57bb1f2 applies the validated wording fixes: ADR 0005 now
records the one-sidedness of the original blind spot, the residual
[98.995, 99.0) rounding window at precision 2 (three-leg convergence), and
the declined rounding-free fail_under=100 alternative. Doc-only delta;
verification: clean tree 58 tests / 100.00% / exit 0, breach case exits 1.

findings.summary: Residual rounding window at precision 2 (98.995 passes, 98.994 fails)
findings.reason: Documented in ADR 0005 with the empirical boundary and re-derivation policy.

findings.summary: Required check's semantics depend on the unpinned coverage transitive
findings.reason: Pre-existing accepted floating-transitives residual (ADR 0004, THREAT_MODEL threat 3); retirement is the already-queued wave-3 hash-pinning candidate, where this finding is additional motivation.
